title: Fix: Stop task execution immediately on build failure instead of continuing
summary: When a build fails during a proposal task (npm run build exit code), the code pauses the task but the LLM agent continues executing more actions. This creates a UX mismatch where the UI shows "paused" but the backend keeps running. Fix by aborting the entire round when build failure is detected, not just the callback.

affectedFiles.description: Set abortSignal when build failure detected to stop LLM execution, preventing agent from continuing while task is marked paused
